'''Brixus Aldine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[House Guard|Guard]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] for [[House Melantha]]. The soldiers under his command were known as the [[Aldine Brigade]].<ref name="Tapani" />

==Biography==
Although not a [[Noble/Legends|noble]], Brixus' family had long served House Melantha and he was a great supporter of the nobles that he protected. He had substantial combat experience having seen service in several little-known border skirmishes. He was known as cunning and merciless adversary.<ref name="Tapani" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Bacta Heist|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
